title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3B — Effective Import Path and Dependency Resolution Map
intent: Install an isolated static effective-import and dependency-resolution evidence bridge using only previously verified mission evidence.
rollback_boundary: Remove only the three newly added V1A-3B Technical Core files and generated V1A-3B mission outputs if validation fails; preserve all source evidence and existing FOXAI files.

from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import hashlib
import json
import ntpath
import re
import sys
from collections import defaultdict
from pathlib import Path, PureWindowsPath
from typing import Any, Iterable

SCHEMA_PREFIX = "foxai.agent_fox.technical_core.v1a3b"
OUTPUT_CEILING = 64 * 1024 * 1024
PROJECT_ROOT_DEFAULT = r"Z:\FOXAI"
SOURCE_V1A2R2_MISSION = "ENG-20260721-063725-BFCAB9"
SOURCE_V1A3A_R1_MISSION = "ENG-20260721-152146-C4F8D5"

OUTPUT_NAMES = (
    "EFFECTIVE_IMPORT_CONTEXTS.json",
    "LAUNCHER_IMPORT_PATH_MAP.json",
    "NORMALIZED_PACKAGE_PROVIDERS.json",
    "STATIC_IMPORT_RESOLUTION.json",
    "REFINED_DEPENDENCY_CONFLICT_CANDIDATES.json",
    "DYNAMIC_IMPORT_AND_PATH_MUTATION_REPORT.json",
    "IMPORT_RESOLUTION_COVERAGE.json",
)

COMMAND_ALIASES = {"python", "python3", "python.exe", "py", "py.exe"}
EXCLUDED_IMPORT_NAMES = {
    "__pycache__", "scripts", "bin", "include", "lib", "libs", "share",
    "data", "tests", "test", "docs", "doc", "licenses", "license",
}
EXCLUDED_SUFFIXES = (".dist-info", ".egg-info", ".data")
PATH_MUTATION_PATTERNS = (
    "sys.path", "site.addsitedir", "site.addsitepackages", "pythonpath",
)
DYNAMIC_IMPORT_PATTERNS = (
    "__import__", "importlib.import_module", "import_module(", "find_spec(",
    "pathfinder", "module_from_spec", "exec_module",
)

# Stable Python 3.x standard-library top-level names used for classification only.
# Provider existence is never treated as proof that an import succeeded.
STDLIB_TOP_LEVEL = {
    "__future__", "_abc", "_ast", "_bisect", "_blake2", "_bz2", "_codecs",
    "_collections", "_contextvars", "_csv", "_datetime", "_decimal", "_functools",
    "_hashlib", "_heapq", "_imp", "_io", "_json", "_locale", "_lzma", "_md5",
    "_multiprocessing", "_opcode", "_operator", "_osx_support", "_pickle",
    "_posixsubprocess", "_queue", "_random", "_sha1", "_sha2", "_sha3",
    "_signal", "_sitebuiltins", "_socket", "_sqlite3", "_ssl", "_stat", "_string",
    "_struct", "_thread", "_tkinter", "_tracemalloc", "_typing", "_uuid", "_warnings",
    "_weakref", "_winapi", "abc", "argparse", "array", "ast", "asyncio", "atexit",
    "base64", "bdb", "binascii", "bisect", "builtins", "bz2", "calendar", "cgi",
    "cgitb", "chunk", "cmath", "cmd", "code", "codecs", "codeop", "collections",
    "colorsys", "compileall", "concurrent", "configparser", "contextlib", "contextvars",
    "copy", "copyreg", "csv", "ctypes", "curses", "dataclasses", "datetime", "dbm",
    "decimal", "difflib", "dis", "doctest", "email", "encodings", "ensurepip", "enum",
    "errno", "faulthandler", "filecmp", "fileinput", "fnmatch", "fractions", "ftplib",
    "functools", "gc", "getopt", "getpass", "gettext", "glob", "graphlib", "gzip",
    "hashlib", "heapq", "hmac", "html", "http", "idlelib", "imaplib", "imghdr",
    "importlib", "inspect", "io", "ipaddress", "itertools", "json", "keyword", "linecache",
    "locale", "logging", "lzma", "mailbox", "mailcap", "marshal", "math", "mimetypes",
    "mmap", "modulefinder", "msilib", "msvcrt", "multiprocessing", "netrc", "nntplib",
    "ntpath", "numbers", "opcode", "operator", "optparse", "os", "pathlib", "pdb",
    "pickle", "pickletools", "pipes", "pkgutil", "platform", "plistlib", "poplib", "posixpath",
    "pprint", "profile", "pstats", "pty", "py_compile", "pyclbr", "pydoc", "queue",
    "quopri", "random", "re", "readline", "reprlib", "resource", "rlcompleter", "runpy",
    "sched", "secrets", "select", "selectors", "shelve", "shlex", "shutil", "signal",
    "site", "smtpd", "smtplib", "sndhdr", "socket", "socketserver", "sqlite3", "ssl",
    "stat", "statistics", "string", "stringprep", "struct", "subprocess", "sunau", "symtable",
    "sys", "sysconfig", "tabnanny", "tarfile", "telnetlib", "tempfile", "textwrap", "threading",
    "time", "timeit", "tkinter", "token", "tokenize", "tomllib", "trace", "traceback", "tracemalloc",
    "tty", "turtle", "types", "typing", "unicodedata", "unittest", "urllib", "uuid", "venv",
    "warnings", "wave", "weakref", "webbrowser", "winreg", "winsound", "wsgiref", "xdrlib",
    "xml", "xmlrpc", "zipapp", "zipfile", "zipimport", "zlib", "zoneinfo",
}


def canonical_json_bytes(value: Any) -> bytes:
    return (json.dumps(value, indent=2, sort_keys=True, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n").encode("utf-8")


def sha256_bytes(data: bytes) -> str:
    return hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()


def sha256_file(path: Path) -> str:
    digest = hashlib.sha256()
    with path.open("rb") as handle:
        for chunk in iter(lambda: handle.read(1024 * 1024), b""):
            digest.update(chunk)
    return digest.hexdigest()


def read_json(path: Path) -> Any:
    return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))


def win_norm(value: str | None) -> str | None:
    if value is None:
        return None
    text = str(value).strip().strip('"')
    if not text:
        return None
    text = text.replace("/", "\\")
    return ntpath.normpath(text)


def win_case(value: str | None) -> str:
    normalized = win_norm(value)
    return normalized.casefold() if normalized else ""


def within_project(path: str | None, project_root: str) -> bool:
    p = win_case(path)
    root = win_case(project_root)
    return bool(p and root and (p == root or p.startswith(root + "\\")))


def valid_import_name(name: str) -> bool:
    if not name or name.casefold() in EXCLUDED_IMPORT_NAMES:
        return False
    low = name.casefold()
    if any(low.endswith(suffix) for suffix in EXCLUDED_SUFFIXES):
        return False
    return all(part.isidentifier() for part in name.split("."))


def top_module(module: str | None) -> str:
    text = str(module or "").lstrip(".")
    return text.split(".", 1)[0] if text else ""


def unique_preserve(records: Iterable[dict[str, Any]], key_fields: tuple[str, ...]) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    seen: set[tuple[Any, ...]] = set()
    output: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    for row in records:
        key = tuple(row.get(field) for field in key_fields)
        if key in seen:
            continue
        seen.add(key)
        output.append(row)
    return output


def verify_receipt_outputs(source_dir: Path, receipt_name: str, required: Iterable[str]) -> dict[str, Any]:
    receipt_path = source_dir / receipt_name
    receipt = read_json(receipt_path)
    recorded = {str(row.get("name")): row for row in receipt.get("core_outputs_before_receipt", [])}
    checks: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    for name in required:
        row = recorded.get(name)
        path = source_dir / PureWindowsPath(name)
        if row is None:
            raise ValueError(f"Source receipt does not record required output: {name}")
        if not path.is_file():
            raise FileNotFoundError(path)
        size = path.stat().st_size
        digest = sha256_file(path)
        if size != int(row.get("size_bytes", -1)) or digest != row.get("sha256"):
            raise ValueError(f"Source evidence hash mismatch: {name}")
        checks.append({"name": name, "size_bytes": size, "sha256": digest, "status": "verified"})
    return {
        "receipt": receipt,
        "receipt_path": str(receipt_path),
        "receipt_sha256": sha256_file(receipt_path),
        "checks": checks,
    }


def load_sources(v1a2r2_dir: Path, v1a3a_r1_dir: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
    v2_required = (
        "STATIC_CODE_INDEX.json", "REFINED_STATIC_LAUNCHER_INDEX.json",
        "STATIC_REFERENCE_CATALOG.json", "KNOWN_GOOD_COMPARISON.json",
        "REFINED_INDEX_COVERAGE.json", "INPUT_CAPTURE_MANIFEST.json",
        "IMMUTABLE_DETERMINISM_REPORT.json", "LIVE_DRIFT_REPORT.json",
    )
    v3_required = (
        "PYTHON_RUNTIME_MAP_CORRECTED.json", "PROBE_POLICY_REPORT.json",
        "INTERPRETER_CONTROL_FILE_REPORT.json", "LAUNCHER_RUNTIME_MAP.json",
        "STATIC_PACKAGE_INVENTORY.json", "DUPLICATE_MODULE_CANDIDATES.json",
        "PYTHON_PATH_BOUNDARY_REPORT.json", "PYTHON_RUNTIME_COVERAGE.json",
        "SOURCE_EVIDENCE_ADOPTION_MANIFEST.json",
    )
    v2_verify = verify_receipt_outputs(v1a2r2_dir, "REFINED_BRIDGE_RECEIPT.json", v2_required)
    catalog = read_json(v1a2r2_dir / "STATIC_REFERENCE_CATALOG.json")
    shard_names = [str(row["name"]) for row in catalog.get("shards", [])]
    v2_shards = verify_receipt_outputs(v1a2r2_dir, "REFINED_BRIDGE_RECEIPT.json", shard_names)
    v3_verify = verify_receipt_outputs(v1a3a_r1_dir, "PYTHON_RUNTIME_CORRECTION_RECEIPT.json", v3_required)
    return {
        "v1a2r2_dir": str(v1a2r2_dir),
        "v1a3a_r1_dir": str(v1a3a_r1_dir),
        "v1a2r2_verification": v2_verify,
        "v1a2r2_shard_verification": v2_shards,
        "v1a3a_r1_verification": v3_verify,
        "code_index": read_json(v1a2r2_dir / "STATIC_CODE_INDEX.json"),
        "launcher_index": read_json(v1a2r2_dir / "REFINED_STATIC_LAUNCHER_INDEX.json"),
        "reference_catalog": catalog,
        "known_good": read_json(v1a2r2_dir / "KNOWN_GOOD_COMPARISON.json"),
        "v1a2r2_coverage": read_json(v1a2r2_dir / "REFINED_INDEX_COVERAGE.json"),
        "runtime_map": read_json(v1a3a_r1_dir / "PYTHON_RUNTIME_MAP_CORRECTED.json"),
        "probe_policy": read_json(v1a3a_r1_dir / "PROBE_POLICY_REPORT.json"),
        "control_files": read_json(v1a3a_r1_dir / "INTERPRETER_CONTROL_FILE_REPORT.json"),
        "launcher_runtime_map": read_json(v1a3a_r1_dir / "LAUNCHER_RUNTIME_MAP.json"),
        "package_inventory": read_json(v1a3a_r1_dir / "STATIC_PACKAGE_INVENTORY.json"),
        "duplicate_candidates": read_json(v1a3a_r1_dir / "DUPLICATE_MODULE_CANDIDATES.json"),
        "path_boundary": read_json(v1a3a_r1_dir / "PYTHON_PATH_BOUNDARY_REPORT.json"),
        "runtime_coverage": read_json(v1a3a_r1_dir / "PYTHON_RUNTIME_COVERAGE.json"),
        "adoption_manifest": read_json(v1a3a_r1_dir / "SOURCE_EVIDENCE_ADOPTION_MANIFEST.json"),
        "reference_shard_paths": [v1a2r2_dir / PureWindowsPath(name) for name in shard_names],
    }


def normalize_package_providers(source: dict[str, Any], project_root: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    provider_map: dict[tuple[str, str], dict[str, Any]] = {}
    namespace_candidates: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    excluded: list[dict[str, Any]] = []

    def add_provider(module: str, site_root: str, owner: str, evidence: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        if not valid_import_name(module):
            excluded.append({"name": module, "site_root": site_root, "reason": "nonimportable_or_excluded"})
            return
        key = (module.casefold(), win_case(site_root))
        record = provider_map.setdefault(key, {
            "module": module,
            "site_root": win_norm(site_root),
            "owner": owner,
            "within_project_root": within_project(site_root, project_root),
            "distribution_names": [],
            "versions": [],
            "evidence": [],
        })
        dist = evidence.get("distribution_name")
        version = evidence.get("version")
        if dist and dist not in record["distribution_names"]:
            record["distribution_names"].append(dist)
        if version and version not in record["versions"]:
            record["versions"].append(version)
        record["evidence"].append(evidence)

    for site in source["package_inventory"].get("site_roots", []):
        site_root = str(site.get("path", ""))
        owner = str(site.get("owner", "unclassified"))
        if not site.get("exists"):
            continue
        for package in site.get("packages", []):
            candidates = list(package.get("top_level_names") or []) + list(package.get("record_top_level_names") or [])
            for module in sorted(set(str(x) for x in candidates)):
                add_provider(module, site_root, owner, {
                    "kind": "distribution_metadata",
                    "distribution_name": package.get("name"),
                    "version": package.get("version"),
                    "metadata_path": package.get("metadata_path"),
                    "metadata_sha256": package.get("metadata_sha256"),
                })
        for direct in site.get("direct_top_level", []):
            name = str(direct.get("name", ""))
            kind = str(direct.get("kind", ""))
            if kind == "namespace_or_data_directory" and valid_import_name(name):
                namespace_candidates.append({
                    "module": name,
                    "site_root": win_norm(site_root),
                    "owner": owner,
                    "path": direct.get("path"),
                    "classification": "namespace_package_candidate_unverified",
                })
            elif kind in {"package_directory", "module_file", "extension_module"}:
                add_provider(name, site_root, owner, {
                    "kind": "direct_top_level",
                    "path": direct.get("path"),
                })
            else:
                excluded.append({"name": name, "site_root": site_root, "reason": f"direct_kind:{kind or 'unknown'}"})

    providers = []
    for record in provider_map.values():
        record["distribution_names"].sort(key=str.casefold)
        record["versions"].sort(key=str.casefold)
        record["evidence"] = sorted(record["evidence"], key=lambda x: json.dumps(x, sort_keys=True))
        seed = f"{record['module']}|{record['site_root']}|{record['owner']}"
        record["provider_id"] = "PKG-" + hashlib.sha256(seed.encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()[:16].upper()
        providers.append(record)
    providers.sort(key=lambda x: (x["module"].casefold(), win_case(x["site_root"]), x["owner"].casefold()))
    namespace_candidates = unique_preserve(
        sorted(namespace_candidates, key=lambda x: (x["module"].casefold(), win_case(x["site_root"]))),
        ("module", "site_root"),
    )
    excluded = unique_preserve(
        sorted(excluded, key=lambda x: (str(x.get("name", "")).casefold(), win_case(x.get("site_root")), str(x.get("reason", "")))),
        ("name", "site_root", "reason"),
    )
    return {
        "schema": f"{SCHEMA_PREFIX}.normalized_package_providers.v1",
        "provider_count": len(providers),
        "namespace_candidate_count": len(namespace_candidates),
        "excluded_nonimportable_count": len(excluded),
        "providers": providers,
        "namespace_package_candidates": namespace_candidates,
        "excluded_entries": excluded,
        "packages_imported": False,
        "pip_invoked": False,
        "activation_verified": False,
    }


def build_first_party_providers(code_index: dict[str, Any], project_root: str) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    providers: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    for file_record in code_index.get("files", []):
        if file_record.get("language") != "python":
            continue
        rel = str(file_record.get("relative_path", "")).replace("/", "\\")
        if not rel.casefold().endswith(".py"):
            continue
        parts = list(PureWindowsPath(rel).parts)
        filename = parts[-1]
        stem = filename[:-3]
        parent_parts = parts[:-1]
        if stem == "__init__":
            if not parent_parts:
                continue
            full_module = ".".join(parent_parts)
            import_root = project_root
            providers.append({
                "module": full_module,
                "top_level": top_module(full_module),
                "provider_path": file_record.get("path"),
                "relative_path": rel,
                "import_root": import_root,
                "provider_kind": "first_party_package",
                "source_sha256": file_record.get("sha256"),
            })
        else:
            full_module = ".".join(parent_parts + [stem])
            providers.append({
                "module": full_module,
                "top_level": top_module(full_module),
                "provider_path": file_record.get("path"),
                "relative_path": rel,
                "import_root": project_root,
                "provider_kind": "first_party_module",
                "source_sha256": file_record.get("sha256"),
            })
            local_root = win_norm(ntpath.join(project_root, *parent_parts)) if parent_parts else project_root
            if parent_parts and valid_import_name(stem):
                providers.append({
                    "module": stem,
                    "top_level": stem,
                    "provider_path": file_record.get("path"),
                    "relative_path": rel,
                    "import_root": local_root,
                    "provider_kind": "first_party_local_module",
                    "source_sha256": file_record.get("sha256"),
                })
    providers = unique_preserve(
        sorted(providers, key=lambda x: (x["module"].casefold(), win_case(x["import_root"]), win_case(x["provider_path"]))),
        ("module", "import_root", "provider_path"),
    )
    for record in providers:
        seed = f"{record['module']}|{record['import_root']}|{record['provider_path']}"
        record["provider_id"] = "FP-" + hashlib.sha256(seed.encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()[:16].upper()
    return providers


def load_reference_lines(source: dict[str, Any]) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    records: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    for path in source["reference_shard_paths"]:
        shard = read_json(path)
        records.extend(shard.get("records", []))
    return records


def build_dynamic_report(reference_lines: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> dict[str, Any]:
    path_mutations: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    dynamic_imports: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    for row in reference_lines:
        if row.get("language") != "python":
            continue
        text = str(row.get("text", ""))
        low = text.casefold()
        base = {"path": row.get("path"), "line": row.get("line"), "text": text}
        if any(pattern in low for pattern in PATH_MUTATION_PATTERNS):
            kind = "pythonpath_reference"
            if "sys.path.insert" in low:
                kind = "sys_path_insert"
            elif "sys.path.append" in low:
                kind = "sys_path_append"
            elif "sys.path.extend" in low:
                kind = "sys_path_extend"
            elif "addsitedir" in low:
                kind = "site_addsitedir"
            path_mutations.append({**base, "kind": kind, "executed_or_effective_proven": False})
        if any(pattern in low for pattern in DYNAMIC_IMPORT_PATTERNS):
            kind = "dynamic_import_reference"
            if "__import__" in low:
                kind = "dunder_import"
            elif "import_module" in low:
                kind = "importlib_import_module"
            elif "find_spec" in low:
                kind = "find_spec"
            dynamic_imports.append({**base, "kind": kind, "executed_or_resolved_proven": False})
    path_mutations = unique_preserve(
        sorted(path_mutations, key=lambda x: (str(x.get("path", "")).casefold(), int(x.get("line") or 0), str(x.get("text", "")))),
        ("path", "line", "text"),
    )
    dynamic_imports = unique_preserve(
        sorted(dynamic_imports, key=lambda x: (str(x.get("path", "")).casefold(), int(x.get("line") or 0), str(x.get("text", "")))),
        ("path", "line", "text"),
    )
    by_path: dict[str, dict[str, list[dict[str, Any]]]] = defaultdict(lambda: {"path_mutations": [], "dynamic_imports": []})
    for row in path_mutations:
        by_path[str(row.get("path", ""))]["path_mutations"].append(row)
    for row in dynamic_imports:
        by_path[str(row.get("path", ""))]["dynamic_imports"].append(row)
    return {
        "schema": f"{SCHEMA_PREFIX}.dynamic_import_and_path_mutation_report.v1",
        "path_mutation_count": len(path_mutations),
        "dynamic_import_reference_count": len(dynamic_imports),
        "path_mutations": path_mutations,
        "dynamic_import_references": dynamic_imports,
        "by_source_path": [
            {"path": path, **values}
            for path, values in sorted(by_path.items(), key=lambda item: item[0].casefold())
        ],
        "source_executed": False,
        "imports_performed": False,
    }


def derive_script_mutations(script: str | None, project_root: str, dynamic_report: dict[str, Any]) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    if not script or not within_project(script, project_root):
        return []
    rel = ntpath.relpath(win_norm(script), win_norm(project_root)).replace("/", "\\")
    matching = next((x for x in dynamic_report.get("by_source_path", []) if str(x.get("path", "")).casefold() == rel.casefold()), None)
    if not matching:
        return []
    output: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    for row in matching.get("path_mutations", []):
        result = dict(row)
        result["derived_path"] = None
        result["derivation"] = "unresolved_static_expression"
        low = str(row.get("text", "")).casefold()
        if "project_root" in low and "sys.path.insert(0" in low:
            result["derived_path"] = win_norm(project_root)
            result["derivation"] = "project_root_from_invoked_file_location_and_named_expression"
        output.append(result)
    return output


def build_contexts(source: dict[str, Any], project_root: str, dynamic_report: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], dict[str, Any]]:
    runtime_records = source["runtime_map"].get("records", [])
    runtime_by_exe = {win_case(row.get("executable")): row for row in runtime_records}
    launcher_detail_by_path = {win_case(row.get("path")): row for row in source["launcher_index"].get("records", [])}
    contexts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    launcher_records: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    path_groups: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}
    contexts_by_launcher: dict[str, list[str]] = defaultdict(list)

    for launcher in sorted(source["launcher_runtime_map"].get("records", []), key=lambda x: win_case(x.get("path"))):
        launcher_path = win_norm(launcher.get("path"))
        detail = launcher_detail_by_path.get(win_case(launcher_path), {})
        detail_invocations = {(int(row.get("line") or 0), str(row.get("command", ""))): row for row in detail.get("interpreter_invocations", [])}
        launcher_context_ids: list[str] = []
        for ordinal, invocation in enumerate(launcher.get("interpreter_invocations", []), start=1):
            line = int(invocation.get("line") or 0)
            detail_invocation = detail_invocations.get((line, str(invocation.get("command", ""))), {})
            raw_interpreter = str((detail_invocation.get("interpreter") or {}).get("raw_value") or invocation.get("interpreter") or "")
            current_interpreter = win_norm(invocation.get("interpreter"))
            raw_simple = raw_interpreter.strip().strip('"')
            raw_base = raw_simple.casefold()
            is_alias = raw_base in COMMAND_ALIASES and not any(ch in raw_simple for ch in "\\/:")
            is_pythonw = ntpath.basename(str(current_interpreter or "")).casefold() == "pythonw.exe"
            runtime = None
            runtime_identity_kind = "unresolved"
            resolved_interpreter = current_interpreter
            if is_alias:
                resolved_interpreter = None
                runtime_identity_kind = "command_alias_requires_path_resolution"
            elif current_interpreter and win_case(current_interpreter) in runtime_by_exe:
                runtime = runtime_by_exe[win_case(current_interpreter)]
                runtime_identity_kind = "directly_observed_python_executable"
            elif is_pythonw and current_interpreter:
                sibling = ntpath.join(ntpath.dirname(current_interpreter), "python.exe")
                runtime = runtime_by_exe.get(win_case(sibling))
                runtime_identity_kind = "pythonw_static_sibling_of_observed_python" if runtime else "pythonw_static_alias_unmapped"

            flags = [str(x) for x in invocation.get("flags", [])]
            flag_set = {x.casefold() for x in flags}
            env = {str(k).upper(): str(v) for k, v in (launcher.get("environment") or {}).items()}
            script = win_norm(invocation.get("script"))
            working_dirs = launcher.get("working_directories") or []
            working_dir = win_norm(working_dirs[-1].get("resolved_path")) if working_dirs else None
            if not working_dir:
                working_dir = win_norm(project_root)
            path_entries: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
            ignored_environment: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
            uncertainty: list[str] = []
            underscore_pth = bool(runtime and runtime.get("site_policy") == "site_enabled_by_underscore_pth")
            ignore_environment = "-i" in flag_set or "-e" in flag_set or underscore_pth
            suppress_script_dir = "-i" in flag_set or "-p" in flag_set or underscore_pth

            def add_path(path: str | None, source_kind: str, evidence: str, status: str = "candidate") -> None:
                normalized = win_norm(path)
                if not normalized:
                    return
                if any(win_case(row.get("path")) == win_case(normalized) for row in path_entries):
                    return
                path_entries.append({
                    "order": len(path_entries),
                    "path": normalized,
                    "source": source_kind,
                    "evidence": evidence,
                    "status": status,
                    "within_project_root": within_project(normalized, project_root),
                })

            if is_alias:
                uncertainty.append("interpreter_command_alias_not_resolved")
            if script and not suppress_script_dir:
                add_path(ntpath.dirname(script), "script_directory", "launcher script path and flags")
            elif script and suppress_script_dir:
                uncertainty.append("script_directory_suppressed_by_isolated_or_safe_path_policy")

            pythonpath = env.get("PYTHONPATH")
            if pythonpath:
                if ignore_environment:
                    ignored_environment.append({"name": "PYTHONPATH", "value": pythonpath, "reason": "ignored_by_-I_or_-E_or_underscore_pth"})
                else:
                    for part in pythonpath.split(";"):
                        if part.strip():
                            add_path(part.strip(), "launcher_pythonpath", "launcher environment")
            pythonhome = env.get("PYTHONHOME")
            if pythonhome and ignore_environment:
                ignored_environment.append({"name": "PYTHONHOME", "value": pythonhome, "reason": "ignored_by_-I_or_-E_or_underscore_pth"})

            if runtime:
                for value in runtime.get("sys_path", []):
                    add_path(value, "observed_runtime_probe_path", f"adopted runtime {runtime.get('runtime_id')}", "observed_under_isolated_probe")
                if runtime_identity_kind.startswith("pythonw_"):
                    uncertainty.append("pythonw_runtime_identity_not_directly_probed")
                if not underscore_pth and "-s" not in flag_set:
                    uncertainty.append("default_site_package_activation_not_directly_observed_for_this_invocation")
            else:
                uncertainty.append("runtime_sys_path_unavailable")

            script_mutations = derive_script_mutations(script, project_root, dynamic_report)
            for mutation in script_mutations:
                if mutation.get("derived_path"):
                    path = mutation["derived_path"]
                    path_entries = [row for row in path_entries if win_case(row.get("path")) != win_case(path)]
                    path_entries.insert(0, {
                        "order": 0,
                        "path": path,
                        "source": "script_static_mutation",
                        "evidence": f"{mutation.get('path')}:{mutation.get('line')} {mutation.get('text')}",
                        "status": "static_expression_candidate",
                        "within_project_root": within_project(path, project_root),
                    })
                    for index, row in enumerate(path_entries):
                        row["order"] = index

            fingerprint_input = {
                "runtime_id": runtime.get("runtime_id") if runtime else None,
                "runtime_identity_kind": runtime_identity_kind,
                "flags": flags,
                "paths": [row["path"] for row in path_entries],
                "ignored_environment": ignored_environment,
                "underscore_pth": underscore_pth,
            }
            fingerprint = sha256_bytes(canonical_json_bytes(fingerprint_input))
            group_id = "PATHGROUP-" + fingerprint[:16].upper()
            path_groups.setdefault(group_id, {
                "path_group_id": group_id,
                "fingerprint_sha256": fingerprint,
                "effective_path_entries": path_entries,
                "runtime_id": runtime.get("runtime_id") if runtime else None,
                "runtime_identity_kind": runtime_identity_kind,
                "flags": flags,
                "underscore_pth_controls_path": underscore_pth,
                "ignored_environment": ignored_environment,
            })
            context_seed = f"{launcher_path}|{line}|{ordinal}|{raw_interpreter}|{script}"
            context_id = "CTX-" + hashlib.sha256(context_seed.encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()[:16].upper()
            context = {
                "context_id": context_id,
                "path_group_id": group_id,
                "launcher_path": launcher_path,
                "launcher_relative_path": launcher.get("relative_path"),
                "launcher_classification": launcher.get("path_classification"),
                "invocation_ordinal": ordinal,
                "line": line,
                "command": invocation.get("command"),
                "source_kind": invocation.get("source_kind"),
                "interpreter_reference": raw_simple or current_interpreter,
                "resolved_interpreter_path": resolved_interpreter,
                "interpreter_reference_kind": runtime_identity_kind,
                "runtime_id": runtime.get("runtime_id") if runtime else None,
                "runtime_portability_classification": runtime.get("portability_classification") if runtime else None,
                "runtime_identity_directly_observed": runtime_identity_kind == "directly_observed_python_executable",
                "pythonw_identity_directly_observed": False if is_pythonw else None,
                "script_path": script,
                "script_exists_static": invocation.get("script_exists"),
                "arguments": invocation.get("arguments", []),
                "flags": flags,
                "working_directory": working_dir,
                "launcher_environment": env,
                "ignored_environment": ignored_environment,
                "effective_path_entries": path_entries,
                "script_static_path_mutations": script_mutations,
                "uncertainty": sorted(set(uncertainty)),
                "execution_or_import_success_proven": False,
            }
            contexts.append(context)
            launcher_context_ids.append(context_id)
            contexts_by_launcher[win_case(launcher_path)].append(context_id)

        called = []
        for row in detail.get("called_launchers", []):
            called_path = win_norm(row.get("resolved_path"))
            called.append({
                "line": row.get("line"),
                "called_launcher_path": called_path,
                "exists_static": row.get("exists"),
                "called_context_ids": [],
                "executed_proven": False,
            })
        launcher_records.append({
            "launcher_path": launcher_path,
            "relative_path": launcher.get("relative_path"),
            "path_classification": launcher.get("path_classification"),
            "context_ids": launcher_context_ids,
            "called_launchers": called,
            "launcher_executed": False,
        })

    for launcher in launcher_records:
        for called in launcher["called_launchers"]:
            called["called_context_ids"] = contexts_by_launcher.get(win_case(called.get("called_launcher_path")), [])

    contexts.sort(key=lambda x: (win_case(x.get("launcher_path")), int(x.get("line") or 0), int(x.get("invocation_ordinal") or 0)))
    launcher_records.sort(key=lambda x: win_case(x.get("launcher_path")))
    return (
        {
            "schema": f"{SCHEMA_PREFIX}.effective_import_contexts.v1",
            "context_count": len(contexts),
            "path_group_count": len(path_groups),
            "contexts": contexts,
            "path_groups": [path_groups[key] for key in sorted(path_groups)],
            "interpreter_child_processes": 0,
            "shell_child_processes": 0,
            "packages_imported": False,
        },
        {
            "schema": f"{SCHEMA_PREFIX}.launcher_import_path_map.v1",
            "source_launcher_record_count": int(source["launcher_runtime_map"].get("source_launcher_record_count", 0)),
            "launcher_record_count": len(launcher_records),
            "context_count": len(contexts),
            "records": launcher_records,
            "launchers_executed": False,
        },
    )


def resolve_imports(source: dict[str, Any], contexts: dict[str, Any], normalized_packages: dict[str, Any], project_root: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    first_party = build_first_party_providers(source["code_index"], project_root)
    third_party_by_module: dict[str, list[dict[str, Any]]] = defaultdict(list)
    for provider in normalized_packages.get("providers", []):
        third_party_by_module[str(provider.get("module", "")).casefold()].append(provider)
    first_party_by_module: dict[str, list[dict[str, Any]]] = defaultdict(list)
    for provider in first_party:
        first_party_by_module[str(provider.get("module", "")).casefold()].append(provider)

    imports: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    for file_record in source["code_index"].get("files", []):
        if file_record.get("language") != "python":
            continue
        classification = file_record.get("path_classification") or {}
        if classification.get("historical_or_derived_location"):
            continue
        for ordinal, row in enumerate(file_record.get("imports", []), start=1):
            module = str(row.get("module") or row.get("name") or "")
            seed = f"{file_record.get('relative_path')}|{row.get('line')}|{ordinal}|{module}|{row.get('name')}"
            imports.append({
                "import_id": "IMP-" + hashlib.sha256(seed.encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()[:16].upper(),
                "source_path": file_record.get("path"),
                "source_relative_path": file_record.get("relative_path"),
                "source_sha256": file_record.get("sha256"),
                "line": row.get("line"),
                "kind": row.get("kind"),
                "module": module,
                "name": row.get("name"),
                "alias": row.get("alias"),
                "top_level_module": top_module(module),
            })
    imports.sort(key=lambda x: (str(x.get("source_relative_path", "")).casefold(), int(x.get("line") or 0), str(x.get("module", "")).casefold(), str(x.get("name", "")).casefold()))

    live_group_ids = {
        str(context.get("path_group_id"))
        for context in contexts.get("contexts", [])
        if not (context.get("launcher_classification") or {}).get("historical_or_derived_location")
    }
    context_counts: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)
    for context in contexts.get("contexts", []):
        context_counts[str(context.get("path_group_id"))] += 1

    group_resolutions: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    skipped_groups: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    classification_counts: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)
    groups = {row["path_group_id"]: row for row in contexts.get("path_groups", [])}
    for group_id in sorted(groups):
        group = groups[group_id]
        if group_id not in live_group_ids:
            skipped_groups.append({
                "path_group_id": group_id,
                "context_count": context_counts.get(group_id, 0),
                "reason": "historical_or_derived_launcher_contexts_preserved_without_full_resolution_expansion",
            })
            continue
        path_order = [win_norm(row.get("path")) for row in group.get("effective_path_entries", []) if row.get("path")]
        path_rank = {win_case(path): index for index, path in enumerate(path_order)}
        rows: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        for imp in imports:
            module = str(imp.get("module", ""))
            relative = module.startswith(".")
            top = str(imp.get("top_level_module", ""))
            candidates: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
            classification = "missing_provider"
            notes: list[str] = []
            if relative:
                classification = "unique_first_party_provider"
                notes.append("relative import requires source package context; provider existence only")
            elif top in STDLIB_TOP_LEVEL:
                classification = "standard_library_candidate"
            else:
                seen_provider_ids: set[str] = set()
                for provider in first_party_by_module.get(module.casefold(), []) + first_party_by_module.get(top.casefold(), []):
                    rank = path_rank.get(win_case(provider.get("import_root")))
                    provider_id = str(provider.get("provider_id"))
                    if rank is not None and provider_id not in seen_provider_ids:
                        candidates.append({"provider_type": "first_party", "provider_id": provider_id, "path_order": rank})
                        seen_provider_ids.add(provider_id)
                for provider in third_party_by_module.get(top.casefold(), []):
                    rank = path_rank.get(win_case(provider.get("site_root")))
                    provider_id = str(provider.get("provider_id"))
                    if rank is not None and provider_id not in seen_provider_ids:
                        candidates.append({"provider_type": "third_party", "provider_id": provider_id, "path_order": rank})
                        seen_provider_ids.add(provider_id)
                candidates.sort(key=lambda x: (int(x.get("path_order", 10**9)), str(x.get("provider_type", "")), str(x.get("provider_id", ""))))
                if len(candidates) == 1:
                    classification = "unique_first_party_provider" if candidates[0]["provider_type"] == "first_party" else "unique_third_party_provider"
                elif len(candidates) > 1:
                    first = candidates[0]
                    if first.get("provider_type") == "first_party" and any(x.get("provider_type") == "third_party" for x in candidates[1:]):
                        classification = "local_shadowing_candidate"
                    else:
                        classification = "multiple_provider_path_order_candidate"
            classification_counts[classification] += 1
            compact = {
                "import_id": imp["import_id"],
                "classification": classification,
                "candidate_count": len(candidates),
                "candidate_providers": candidates,
                "import_success_proven": False,
            }
            if notes:
                compact["notes"] = notes
            rows.append(compact)
        group_resolutions.append({
            "path_group_id": group_id,
            "runtime_id": group.get("runtime_id"),
            "runtime_identity_kind": group.get("runtime_identity_kind"),
            "effective_path_order": path_order,
            "import_record_count": len(rows),
            "resolutions": rows,
        })
    return {
        "schema": f"{SCHEMA_PREFIX}.static_import_resolution.v1",
        "source_import_record_count": len(imports),
        "resolved_live_path_group_count": len(group_resolutions),
        "historical_path_group_count_preserved_without_expansion": len(skipped_groups),
        "resolution_record_count": sum(len(x["resolutions"]) for x in group_resolutions),
        "classification_counts": dict(sorted(classification_counts.items())),
        "import_catalog": imports,
        "first_party_provider_count": len(first_party),
        "first_party_provider_catalog": first_party,
        "third_party_provider_catalog_reference": "NORMALIZED_PACKAGE_PROVIDERS.json",
        "path_group_resolutions": group_resolutions,
        "historical_path_groups": skipped_groups,
        "imports_performed": False,
        "import_success_proven": False,
    }

def build_conflicts(contexts: dict[str, Any], packages: dict[str, Any], static_resolution: dict[str, Any], source: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
    providers_by_module: dict[str, list[dict[str, Any]]] = defaultdict(list)
    for row in packages.get("providers", []):
        providers_by_module[str(row.get("module", "")).casefold()].append(row)
    path_groups = {row["path_group_id"]: row for row in contexts.get("path_groups", [])}
    same_context: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    separate_runtime: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    host_portable: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    for module, providers in sorted(providers_by_module.items()):
        versions = sorted({version for provider in providers for version in provider.get("versions", [])}, key=str.casefold)
        roots = sorted({win_norm(provider.get("site_root")) for provider in providers if provider.get("site_root")}, key=lambda x: win_case(x))
        if len(providers) < 2:
            continue
        provider_summary = [{
            "site_root": p.get("site_root"), "owner": p.get("owner"),
            "distribution_names": p.get("distribution_names"), "versions": p.get("versions"),
        } for p in providers]
        active_groups = []
        for group_id, group in path_groups.items():
            group_roots = {win_case(row.get("path")) for row in group.get("effective_path_entries", [])}
            present = [p for p in providers if win_case(p.get("site_root")) in group_roots]
            if len(present) > 1:
                active_groups.append(group_id)
        record = {
            "module": module,
            "versions": versions,
            "provider_roots": roots,
            "providers": provider_summary,
            "active_or_successful_import_conflict_proven": False,
        }
        if active_groups:
            same_context.append({**record, "path_group_ids": active_groups, "classification": "same_effective_context_collision_candidate"})
        else:
            separate_runtime.append({**record, "classification": "separate_runtime_or_unreachable_provider_difference"})
        has_host = any(not bool(p.get("within_project_root")) for p in providers)
        has_portable = any(bool(p.get("within_project_root")) for p in providers)
        if has_host and has_portable:
            host_portable.append({**record, "classification": "host_versus_portable_candidate"})

    historical_missing: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    current_missing: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    for row in source["path_boundary"].get("missing_launcher_package_paths", []):
        categories = set((row.get("path_classification") or {}).get("categories", []))
        target = historical_missing if categories.intersection({"archive", "backup", "package", "snapshot", "receipt", "mission_workspace"}) else current_missing
        target.append(row)

    return {
        "schema": f"{SCHEMA_PREFIX}.refined_dependency_conflict_candidates.v1",
        "same_effective_context_collision_candidate_count": len(same_context),
        "separate_runtime_version_or_provider_difference_count": len(separate_runtime),
        "host_versus_portable_candidate_count": len(host_portable),
        "historical_missing_launcher_package_path_count": len(historical_missing),
        "nonhistorical_missing_launcher_package_path_count": len(current_missing),
        "same_effective_context_collision_candidates": same_context,
        "separate_runtime_version_or_provider_differences": separate_runtime,
        "host_versus_portable_candidates": host_portable,
        "historical_missing_launcher_package_paths": historical_missing,
        "nonhistorical_missing_launcher_package_paths": current_missing,
        "active_collision_proven": False,
        "packages_imported": False,
    }


def build_outputs(source: dict[str, Any], project_root: str, mission_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    reference_lines = load_reference_lines(source)
    dynamic_report = build_dynamic_report(reference_lines)
    package_providers = normalize_package_providers(source, project_root)
    contexts, launcher_map = build_contexts(source, project_root, dynamic_report)
    static_resolution = resolve_imports(source, contexts, package_providers, project_root)
    conflicts = build_conflicts(contexts, package_providers, static_resolution, source)

    protected_paths = {
        r"z:\foxai\launch foxai workshop.bat": "workshop",
        r"z:\foxai\start_foxai_web_portable.bat": "web_portable",
        r"z:\foxai\start_foxai_web_with_comfyui.bat": "web_with_comfyui",
        r"z:\foxai\start_foxai_desktop_two_window_recovery.bat": "desktop_recovery",
    }
    protected_context_summary: dict[str, Any] = {}
    for context in contexts["contexts"]:
        label = protected_paths.get(win_case(context.get("launcher_path")))
        if label:
            protected_context_summary.setdefault(label, []).append({
                "context_id": context.get("context_id"),
                "line": context.get("line"),
                "runtime_id": context.get("runtime_id"),
                "interpreter_reference": context.get("interpreter_reference"),
                "interpreter_reference_kind": context.get("interpreter_reference_kind"),
                "script_path": context.get("script_path"),
                "flags": context.get("flags"),
                "effective_paths": [x.get("path") for x in context.get("effective_path_entries", [])],
            })

    coverage = {
        "schema": f"{SCHEMA_PREFIX}.import_resolution_coverage.v1",
        "mission_id": mission_id,
        "result": "effective_import_path_and_dependency_resolution_map_complete",
        "source_v1a2r2_mission_id": SOURCE_V1A2R2_MISSION,
        "source_v1a3a_r1_mission_id": SOURCE_V1A3A_R1_MISSION,
        "source_launcher_record_count": int(source["launcher_runtime_map"].get("source_launcher_record_count", 0)),
        "source_code_file_count": int(source["code_index"].get("file_count", 0)),
        "context_count": contexts["context_count"],
        "path_group_count": contexts["path_group_count"],
        "source_import_record_count": static_resolution["source_import_record_count"],
        "resolution_record_count": static_resolution["resolution_record_count"],
        "normalized_package_provider_count": package_providers["provider_count"],
        "namespace_candidate_count": package_providers["namespace_candidate_count"],
        "dynamic_import_reference_count": dynamic_report["dynamic_import_reference_count"],
        "path_mutation_count": dynamic_report["path_mutation_count"],
        "protected_context_summary": protected_context_summary,
        "known_good_candidates_all_match": bool(source["known_good"].get("all_match")),
        "source_outputs_verified": True,
        "interpreter_child_processes": 0,
        "shell_child_processes": 0,
        "packages_imported": False,
        "pip_invoked": False,
        "network_used": False,
        "models_loaded": False,
        "launchers_executed": False,
        "foxai_source_executed": False,
        "active_collision_proven": False,
        "limitations": [
            "Static provider existence does not prove import success.",
            "pythonw.exe identity is inferred only as a sibling candidate where applicable.",
            "Bare command aliases require PATH resolution and are intentionally unresolved.",
            "Dynamic import expressions and nonliteral path mutations remain evidence-incomplete.",
        ],
    }
    outputs = {
        "EFFECTIVE_IMPORT_CONTEXTS.json": contexts,
        "LAUNCHER_IMPORT_PATH_MAP.json": launcher_map,
        "NORMALIZED_PACKAGE_PROVIDERS.json": package_providers,
        "STATIC_IMPORT_RESOLUTION.json": static_resolution,
        "REFINED_DEPENDENCY_CONFLICT_CANDIDATES.json": conflicts,
        "DYNAMIC_IMPORT_AND_PATH_MUTATION_REPORT.json": dynamic_report,
        "IMPORT_RESOLUTION_COVERAGE.json": coverage,
    }
    return outputs


def write_build(source: dict[str, Any], output_dir: Path, project_root: str, mission_id: str) -> None:
    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=False)
    first = build_outputs(source, project_root, mission_id)
    second = build_outputs(source, project_root, mission_id)
    first_bytes = {name: canonical_json_bytes(value) for name, value in first.items()}
    second_bytes = {name: canonical_json_bytes(value) for name, value in second.items()}
    if first_bytes != second_bytes:
        differing = sorted(name for name in first_bytes if first_bytes[name] != second_bytes.get(name))
        raise ValueError(f"Internal deterministic rebuild mismatch: {differing}")
    total = sum(len(data) for data in first_bytes.values())
    if total > OUTPUT_CEILING:
        raise ValueError(f"Output ceiling exceeded before receipt: {total}")
    output_manifest = []
    for name in OUTPUT_NAMES:
        data = first_bytes[name]
        path = output_dir / name
        path.write_bytes(data)
        output_manifest.append({"name": name, "size_bytes": len(data), "sha256": sha256_bytes(data)})
    receipt = {
        "schema": f"{SCHEMA_PREFIX}.effective_import_map_receipt.v1",
        "mission_id": mission_id,
        "result": "effective_import_path_and_dependency_resolution_map_complete",
        "source_v1a2r2_mission_id": SOURCE_V1A2R2_MISSION,
        "source_v1a3a_r1_mission_id": SOURCE_V1A3A_R1_MISSION,
        "source_v1a2r2_receipt_sha256": source["v1a2r2_verification"]["receipt_sha256"],
        "source_v1a3a_r1_receipt_sha256": source["v1a3a_r1_verification"]["receipt_sha256"],
        "source_outputs_verified_exact": True,
        "internal_deterministic_rebuild_match": True,
        "compared_output_count": len(first_bytes),
        "core_outputs_before_receipt": output_manifest,
        "output_bytes_before_receipt": total,
        "output_ceiling_bytes": OUTPUT_CEILING,
        "source_launcher_record_count": int(source["launcher_runtime_map"].get("source_launcher_record_count", 0)),
        "source_code_file_count": int(source["code_index"].get("file_count", 0)),
        "interpreter_child_processes": 0,
        "shell_child_processes": 0,
        "packages_imported": False,
        "pip_invoked": False,
        "network_used": False,
        "models_loaded": False,
        "launchers_executed": False,
        "foxai_source_imported_or_executed": False,
        "pythonw_executed": False,
        "existing_foxai_source_modified": False,
        "active_collision_proven": False,
        "known_good_candidates_all_match": bool(source["known_good"].get("all_match")),
    }
    (output_dir / "EFFECTIVE_IMPORT_MAP_RECEIPT.json").write_bytes(canonical_json_bytes(receipt))


def validate_output(index_dir: Path) -> None:
    receipt = read_json(index_dir / "EFFECTIVE_IMPORT_MAP_RECEIPT.json")
    if receipt.get("result") != "effective_import_path_and_dependency_resolution_map_complete":
        raise ValueError("Unexpected result")
    for row in receipt.get("core_outputs_before_receipt", []):
        path = index_dir / row["name"]
        if not path.is_file() or path.stat().st_size != row["size_bytes"] or sha256_file(path) != row["sha256"]:
            raise ValueError(f"Output verification failed: {row['name']}")
    coverage = read_json(index_dir / "IMPORT_RESOLUTION_COVERAGE.json")
    contexts = read_json(index_dir / "EFFECTIVE_IMPORT_CONTEXTS.json")
    launcher_map = read_json(index_dir / "LAUNCHER_IMPORT_PATH_MAP.json")
    packages = read_json(index_dir / "NORMALIZED_PACKAGE_PROVIDERS.json")
    conflicts = read_json(index_dir / "REFINED_DEPENDENCY_CONFLICT_CANDIDATES.json")
    if coverage.get("source_launcher_record_count") != 536:
        raise ValueError("Launcher coverage mismatch")
    if coverage.get("source_code_file_count") != 565:
        raise ValueError("Source coverage mismatch")
    if launcher_map.get("launcher_record_count") != 536:
        raise ValueError("Launcher map count mismatch")
    if contexts.get("context_count", 0) <= 0:
        raise ValueError("No import contexts generated")
    if packages.get("packages_imported") is not False or conflicts.get("active_collision_proven") is not False:
        raise ValueError("Unsafe package/conflict claim")
    if receipt.get("interpreter_child_processes") != 0 or receipt.get("shell_child_processes") != 0:
        raise ValueError("Unexpected child process count")
    total = sum(path.stat().st_size for path in index_dir.rglob("*") if path.is_file())
    if total > OUTPUT_CEILING:
        raise ValueError(f"Output ceiling exceeded: {total}")


def self_test() -> None:
    assert win_norm(r"Z:\FOXAI\core\..\foxai.py") == r"Z:\FOXAI\foxai.py"
    assert valid_import_name("customtkinter")
    assert not valid_import_name("__pycache__")
    assert top_module("ui.main_window") == "ui"
    assert top_module(".policy") == "policy"
    alias = "python"
    assert alias.casefold() in COMMAND_ALIASES and not any(ch in alias for ch in "\\/:")
    sample = canonical_json_bytes({"b": 1, "a": 2})
    assert sample == canonical_json_bytes({"a": 2, "b": 1})
    print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3B_SELF_TEST_OK")


def find_context(index_dir: Path, context_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    data = read_json(index_dir / "EFFECTIVE_IMPORT_CONTEXTS.json")
    for row in data.get("contexts", []):
        if str(row.get("context_id", "")).casefold() == context_id.casefold():
            return row
    raise KeyError(context_id)


def query_resolve_import(index_dir: Path, context_id: str, module: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    contexts = read_json(index_dir / "EFFECTIVE_IMPORT_CONTEXTS.json")
    context = find_context(index_dir, context_id)
    group_id = context["path_group_id"]
    data = read_json(index_dir / "STATIC_IMPORT_RESOLUTION.json")
    group = next(row for row in data.get("path_group_resolutions", []) if row.get("path_group_id") == group_id)
    rows = [row for row in group.get("resolutions", []) if str(row.get("module", "")).casefold() == module.casefold() or str(row.get("top_level_module", "")).casefold() == module.casefold()]
    return {"context": context, "path_group": next(x for x in contexts.get("path_groups", []) if x.get("path_group_id") == group_id), "matches": rows}


def query_provider(index_dir: Path, module: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    data = read_json(index_dir / "NORMALIZED_PACKAGE_PROVIDERS.json")
    rows = [row for row in data.get("providers", []) if str(row.get("module", "")).casefold() == module.casefold()]
    namespaces = [row for row in data.get("namespace_package_candidates", []) if str(row.get("module", "")).casefold() == module.casefold()]
    return {"module": module, "providers": rows, "namespace_candidates": namespaces, "import_success_proven": False}


def query_versions(index_dir: Path, module: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    providers = query_provider(index_dir, module)["providers"]
    return {"module": module, "providers": [{"owner": x.get("owner"), "site_root": x.get("site_root"), "distributions": x.get("distribution_names"), "versions": x.get("versions")} for x in providers], "active_collision_proven": False}


def main() -> int:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Agent Fox V1A-3B static effective import evidence map")
    sub = parser.add_subparsers(dest="command", required=True)
    sub.add_parser("self-test")
    build = sub.add_parser("build")
    build.add_argument("--project-root", required=True)
    build.add_argument("--v1a2r2-dir", required=True)
    build.add_argument("--v1a3a-r1-dir", required=True)
    build.add_argument("--output-dir", required=True)
    build.add_argument("--mission-id", required=True)
    validate = sub.add_parser("validate-output")
    validate.add_argument("--index-dir", required=True)
    explain = sub.add_parser("explain-import-context")
    explain.add_argument("--index-dir", required=True)
    explain.add_argument("--context-id", required=True)
    resolve = sub.add_parser("resolve-import")
    resolve.add_argument("--index-dir", required=True)
    resolve.add_argument("--context-id", required=True)
    resolve.add_argument("--module", required=True)
    provider = sub.add_parser("show-package-provider")
    provider.add_argument("--index-dir", required=True)
    provider.add_argument("--module", required=True)
    versions = sub.add_parser("compare-runtime-versions")
    versions.add_argument("--index-dir", required=True)
    versions.add_argument("--module", required=True)
    args = parser.parse_args()
    if args.command == "self-test":
        self_test()
    elif args.command == "build":
        source = load_sources(Path(args.v1a2r2_dir), Path(args.v1a3a_r1_dir))
        write_build(source, Path(args.output_dir), win_norm(args.project_root) or args.project_root, args.mission_id)
    elif args.command == "validate-output":
        validate_output(Path(args.index_dir))
        print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3B_OUTPUTS_VERIFIED")
    elif args.command == "explain-import-context":
        print(json.dumps(find_context(Path(args.index_dir), args.context_id), indent=2, sort_keys=True))
    elif args.command == "resolve-import":
        print(json.dumps(query_resolve_import(Path(args.index_dir), args.context_id, args.module), indent=2, sort_keys=True))
    elif args.command == "show-package-provider":
        print(json.dumps(query_provider(Path(args.index_dir), args.module), indent=2, sort_keys=True))
    elif args.command == "compare-runtime-versions":
        print(json.dumps(query_versions(Path(args.index_dir), args.module), indent=2, sort_keys=True))
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())

# Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3B

V1A-3B builds a static, evidence-backed map of effective Python import contexts and dependency-resolution candidates.

It reads the verified V1A-2R2 launcher/source evidence and V1A-3A-R1 runtime/package evidence. It does not execute FOXAI source, launchers, Python runtimes, `pythonw.exe`, packages, models, PowerShell, services, or repair actions.

The bridge creates one context for every statically identified Python invocation, while keeping called launchers and multi-stage launchers separate. Bare commands such as `python` remain unresolved command aliases. `pythonw.exe` is represented only as a static sibling candidate of the observed Desktop Python runtime.

Provider existence and path order are evidence candidates. They do not prove an import succeeded or that a dependency collision is active.

The generated query interface reads generated JSON indexes only:

- `resolve-import`
- `explain-import-context`
- `show-package-provider`
- `compare-runtime-versions`
